title: 实际上我的使用体验，结合自身开发经历，认为可以加一个浏览器测试验证的角色，更能将想要的效果跑通
author: panxiangyu1995

title: 是否需要新增一个检测的skill，针对非从0开始的项目
author: beerui
body:
主要想解决的问题：
- 已有项目的架构和职责未构建到对应的角色中。
- 已有的组件、API、规范、路由其实是不知道的。
- 增量加入到`CLAUDE.md`中 大概率是无法触发只能体内容的。（此处需要先分析现有项目的CLAUDE.md）再拆分组装到对应的角色中。

title: 实际测试, 没有解决 context 窗口有限的问题.
author: jtianling
body: 思路很不错, 不过实际测试, 没有解决 context 窗口有限的问题, 导致实际用途很有限.

title: 为啥创建团队要覆盖CLAUDE.md
author: zhijunhuang
body: 创建团队时，团队运营手册会覆盖原有CLAUDE.md的内容，我希望是追加而不是覆盖。

title: SendMessage 工具不可用
author: zhijunhuang
body:
怎么补齐 SendMessage 工具？

  这是 CCteam-creator 团队系统的核心通信机制，让 team-lead 和各 agent 之间能直接发消息。之前尝试调用时返回了错误：

  Error: No such tool available: SendMessage

  这可能是：
  - 环境限制（某些 Claude Code 配置中禁用）
  - 需要特定权限或配置

title: 在claude code调用不是很顺畅，经常没有实际调用
author: juxing009
body: 经常输入/CCteam-creator:setup后没有用上这个技能，实际是Agent自己完成的虚假团队，需要多次沟通才能真正调用，大神修复一下

title: Feature Request: Add `/resume` command to restore interrupted sessions
author: NeoFii
body:
## Feature Request: Resume Interrupted Sessions

### Problem

After interrupting and exiting Claude Code mid-development, returning to the previous session provides no clear way to resume unfinished work. Running `/setup` again restarts the flow rather than picking up where things left off — and there's no documented command or method to restore an in-progress state.

This creates friction in real-world usage where interruptions (context limits, manual exits, system restarts) are common.

### Current Behavior

- `/setup` re-initializes the team setup flow instead of detecting existing `.plans/` state
- No `/resume` or `/continue` command exists
- Users must manually instruct agents to re-read `task_plan.md` and `progress.md` files — this is undocumented and non-obvious
- The Context Recovery protocol (progressive disclosure: `docs/` → task files → `progress.md`) exists internally but is not surfaced as a user-facing command

### Expected Behavior

A dedicated `/CCteam-creator:resume` command (or equivalent) that:

1. Detects existing `.plans/<project>/` directories
2. Reads `task_plan.md`, `progress.md`, and relevant `findings.md` files
3. Presents a summary of current status: completed tasks, in-progress tasks, blockers
4. Allows the user to confirm and continue from where the team left off

### Suggested Implementation

```
/CCteam-creator:resume [optional: project-name]
```

- If only one `.plans/` project exists → auto-resume it
- If multiple exist → list them and ask the user to choose
- Leverage the existing Context Recovery protocol already defined in agent onboarding

### Why This Matters

The file-based persistence architecture (`task_plan.md`, `progress.md`, etc.) already does the heavy lifting — the state is there. A `resume` command would simply expose it as a first-class user experience rather than requiring manual workarounds.

This would significantly improve the reliability and usability of CCteam-creator in long-running projects where interruptions are inevitable.

### Environment

- Claude Code with `CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1`
- CCteam-creator installed via marketplace or manual install
